package.name: uav_rl_guidance
package.description: Learned guidance law (GRU policy) for vision-based UAV interception — C++ implementation. Uses ONNX Runtime for model inference (zero PyTorch dependency). Drop-in replacement for uav_vision_png: same topics, same state machine, same CSV statistics format. Built-in PNG fallback on policy anomaly (watchdog) or when fallback_png:=true (A/B baseline mode).
